form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At very long odds at debut, ran last of 10 at Dundalk All Weather on February 13 over 2414m, 81 len behind Palmezzano carrying 59kg at $151. Second-up ran last of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on March 27 over 1609m, 24 len behind Gaiety Girl with 56.5kg at $301. Taking on a better field but she looks an improver who can measure up.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fifth of 16 at Cork September 30 over 1609m, 5 len behind Bloom carrying 58kg at $23. On debut fifth of 10 at this track September 2 over 1408m, 9 len behind Kensington Lane carrying 58kg at $17. Has plenty going for her and is sure to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fifth of 16 at Cork September 30 over 1609m, 5 len behind Bloom carrying 58kg at $23. On debut fifth of 10 at this track September 2 over 1408m, 9 len behind Kensington Lane carrying 58kg at $17. Has plenty going for her and is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Not seen since she finished last of 7 at Galway September 9 over 1408m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Zous And Me with 56.5kg at $8.50. On debut eighth of 15 at Naas August 24 over 1408m, 6 len behind Caught U Sleeping with 56.5kg at $17. Can improve so not to be underestimated.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Dundalk All Weather November 21 over 1609m, 10 len behind Sky Watch with 58kg at $81. On debut seventh of 9 at this track September 20 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Ice Dancer with 58kg at $15. Wait until she shows something.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 3rd of 13 at Curragh on October 4 over 1408m, 4 len behind Cameo carrying 58kg at $5.50. Shows promise and worth following up.
